claims.claim_text: Patrick Debois helped catalyze the DevOps movement with DevOpsDays in 2009.
claims.span_hint: section: From DevOps to Platform Engineering, paragraph 2
claims.rationale: This is a specific historical event/person/date claim, and the primary source is off-allowlist on devopsdays.org.

claims.claim_text: The CALMS model became a useful way to discuss DevOps adoption because it emphasized that automation alone was not enough.
claims.span_hint: section: From DevOps to Platform Engineering, paragraph 2
claims.rationale: This is a named framework claim that should be tied to a primary or near-primary explanation, but the best matching source is off-allowlist.

claims.claim_text: Team Topologies distinguishes team types by purpose and describes how they should interact.
claims.span_hint: section: Team Topologies and Interaction Modes, paragraph 1
claims.rationale: This is a named organizational framework claim, and the authoritative description is on the Team Topologies site, which is outside the allowlist.

claims.claim_text: Backstage began as Spotify's internal developer portal before becoming a widely adopted open source project.
claims.rationale: An allowlisted CNCF source directly states that Backstage was created at Spotify, became mission-critical internally, and was later open-sourced.

further_reading.title: What is platform engineering?
further_reading.why_relevant: Provides a current vendor-neutral-style overview of platform engineering, internal platforms, and golden paths.

further_reading.title: Backstage project joins the CNCF Incubator
further_reading.why_relevant: Useful primary history for a major platform-engineering tool and its evolution from internal platform to CNCF project.

further_reading.title: Backstage GitHub repository
further_reading.why_relevant: Shows the upstream project positioning, core components, and current canonical entry point for Backstage.

notes: Seeded only prose claims that clearly need inline sourcing under the module rules; excluded tables, code blocks, Mermaid diagrams, quizzes, and exercise scaffolds.
